metadata.name: Prepare Response to Payer Formulary Request

description: A health economics and outcomes research (HEOR) specialist must prepare a dossier for a payer (insurance company) that is considering adding a new drug to its formulary.

nodes.task_description: Assemble the core value dossier for the product, including all clinical efficacy and safety data.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all the relevant clinical study reports.

nodes.task_description: Incorporate economic models showing the cost-effectiveness of the drug compared to competitors.

expected_outcome.value: Agent embeds the approved economic models and their outputs into the dossier.

nodes.task_description: Tailor the dossier to the specific payer's format and requirements.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reformats the dossier to match the payer's template (e.g., AMCP format).

nodes.task_description: Submit the final dossier to the payer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the dossier via the payer's portal.
